name: 2026-06-04 Political Commentary Flood Control Hearing Postponed TH
description:
Today's Senate Blue Ribbon hearing on flood control corruption was postponed.

Until further notice. Not because the evidence ran out. Because two factions of senators cannot agree on who chairs the committee.

Kailan pa ba?

The country is still waiting for a verdict on the flood control billions. The Senate is too busy fighting over the chair.

Until further notice. Not because the evidence ran out. Because two factions of senators cannot agree on who chairs the committee.

Kailan pa ba?

The country is still waiting for a verdict on the flood control billions. The Senate is too busy fighting over the chair.

Today's Senate Blue Ribbon hearing on flood control corruption was postponed.

Until further notice. Not because the evidence ran out. Because two factions of senators cannot agree on who chairs the committee.

Kailan pa ba?

The country is still waiting for a verdict on the flood control billions. The Senate is too busy fighting over the chair.

On 2026-06-04 Sen. Erwin Tulfo (newly installed Blue Ribbon chair after the 2026-06-03 Senate majority declared all committee posts vacant) formally announced that the 9th public hearing on the flood control corruption scandal is postponed 'until further notice', reset to June 8. Same morning: Sen. Gatchalian declared no official Senate business and ordered WFH; Sen. Cayetano (still claiming the Senate presidency) ordered the premises kept open and the hearing to proceed. The flood control probe is the casualty of the chair fight.
